# Attribution

The skills in this directory are sourced from third-party projects. Credit and
upstream sources are listed below.

| Skill | Source | License |
|---|---|---|
| `autoreview` | https://github.com/openclaw/agent-skills | MIT |
| `grill-me` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `improve-codebase-architecture` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `prd-to-issues` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `prd-to-plan` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `wizard` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `write-a-prd` | https://github.com/mattpocock/skills | MIT |
| `review-loop` | https://github.com/2dmurali/review-loop-skill | MIT |

Licenses verified against each source repository on 2026-06-17.
`openclaw/agent-skills` and `mattpocock/skills` ship an MIT `LICENSE` file;
`2dmurali/review-loop-skill` declares MIT in its README (no separate `LICENSE`
file).
